lesson.menu_desc: Mapping Your English in the Bloomberg World -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + Who Is Fabiana? -- Mapping Your English in the Bloomberg World
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fabiana Michelly Silva | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Hi Fabiana, this is Marcus from the Singapore office. I am calling about the Q3 equipment order. We have a situation with the terminal shipment. The carrier informed us that there is a customs clearance delay, and the estimated delivery has been pushed back by two weeks. I know this affects your timeline for the trading floor rollout. Could we schedule a call tomorrow to discuss contingency options? I have already contacted our backup vendor, and they might be able to expedite a partial shipment. Let me know what works for you. Thanks.

Good morning everyone. This is Sarah Chen from procurement with a quick update on our vendor evaluation process. We have completed the first round of assessments for the new hardware suppliers. Three vendors met our compliance requirements, and two exceeded our performance benchmarks. However, we identified a bottleneck in the logistics pipeline that we need to address before finalizing contracts. The lead time from the Asia Pacific region has increased by approximately fifteen percent compared to last quarter. I recommend we schedule a cross-functional meeting with supply chain and finance to align on the revised timeline. Please review the summary I shared and let me know your availability for Thursday or Friday.

extra_audio.text: Marcus calls about a shipment delay. He explains the customs clearance issue. He mentions the backup vendor option. Fabiana suggests a cross-functional meeting. They agree on next steps and a follow-up call.
